title: inbox.confirm
description: Confirm the next action for a classified Inbox item. For single_type items, action must be 'confirm' (direct Inventory promotion). For mixed items, action must be 'split' (generate a reviewable plan). Always creates a Plan in state ready_for_review with destination paths targeting Inventory directly. Requires the contentSignature from the most recent inbox.classify response to guard against TOCTOU drift.
_note: This schema predates spec 041's single-type confirm path and several already-shipped Rust-side fields (root_absolute_path, root_id, actions_summary, organization_state, destinations) it does not yet describe; the Rust DTOs (crates/contracts/core/src/inbox.rs) and generated TS bindings are the operative contract (same posture as crates/contracts/core/src/framing.rs's Q27 DTOs, which have no JSON Schema at all). This 1.2.0 bump adds only the additive Q27 attribution fields (chosen_attribution / attribution_candidates / attribution_applied, F-Framing-10 FR-022) without reconciling the pre-existing drift, which is out of this task's scope.

content_signature.description: The contentSignature returned by the most recent inbox.classify call. If this does not match the current folder state, the operation returns classification.stale. (Ref: A8, R-Sig-1)

destructive_destination.description: Required when the resulting plan includes destructive items. 'archive' uses the app-managed archive location; 'trash' uses the OS-native recycle bin. (Ref: R-DestChoice)

chosen_attribution.description: Spec 008 Q27 F-Framing-10 (FR-022) attribution apply-path — additive. The user's pick from a prior attributionCandidates list. Only meaningful for light-frame items.

plan_state.description: Plans created by this operation always land in ready_for_review.

items_total.description: Number of plan items created. Equals the number of files enumerated from InboxClassificationEvidence rows (not derived from fileCount). (Ref: A9)

attribution_candidates.description: Spec 008 Q27 F-Framing-5 (FR-019) ranked attribution suggestions. Empty for non-light items or when nothing matched.

attribution_applied.description: Present when the request carried a chosen_attribution that was applied (F-Framing-10/6).

errors.description: No InboxItem exists for the provided inbox_item_id.
The Inbox item already has a Plan in an open state (draft, ready_for_review, approved, applying, or paused). The caller should route to the existing plan. (Ref: E1)
Action does not match the current classification. For example: action='confirm' on a mixed item, or action='split' on a single_type item, or any action on an unclassified item.

The supplied contentSignature does not match the current folder state. The folder has changed since classification. The caller must re-classify and review the updated result before confirming. (Ref: A8, R-Sig-1)

stale_since.description: Approximate timestamp at which the signature mismatch was detected.

errors.description: The active Naming & Structure pattern (spec 015) is unset, invalid, or fails to resolve required tokens for one or more files. No plan was created.
chosen_attribution was supplied but this item's frames are not light frames (spec 008 Q27 F-Framing-5/10).
chosen_attribution requires creating a new framing, but this item has no pointing/rotation/optic-train data staged from its FITS/XISF headers.
